DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT SRF RECOVERY, KWAN WO IRONWORKS, INC., FLORENCE KONG DEMURRER TO AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED at this time. Demurrer to causes of action for Breach of Contract, Quantum Meruit, and Account Stated based on statute of limitations in overruled. These causes of action relate back to the filing of the original complaint. For the purposes of the demurrer will consider the Cross-Complaint's allegations regarding the fence as true. There appears to be a factual dispute between the parties as to the location, timing and erection of various types of fences. This factual dispute cannot be addressed on a demurrer.
Demurrer to the causes of action for Public Nuisance, Private Nuisance, Premises Liability, Trespass, Declaratory and Injunctive Relief is OVERRULED. Claims against third-parties are properly brought in this cross-complaint.
Alternatively, the Court will sustain the demurrer to these causes of action per the cross-defendant's request in this case, vacate the dismissal in case 594093 and will entertain a motion to consolidate. If parties wish to proceed with the alternative ruling as stated above, the parties shall so advice the Court at the hearing.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)
